texto: For a day, just for one day,Talk about that which disturbs no oneAnd bring some peace into yourBeautiful eyes.
autor: The Subject Tonight Is Love: 60 Wild and Sweet Poems of Hafiz
explicacao: Citação de The Subject Tonight Is Love: 60 Wild and Sweet Poems of Hafiz sobre temas ligados a vida. “For a day, just for one day,Talk about that which disturbs no oneAnd bring some peace into yourBe…” articula vida, comfort, paz em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como vida e paz.

texto: Build a House for men and birds.Sit with them and play music.For a day, for just one day,talk about that which disturbs no oneand bring some peace,my friend,into your beautiful eyes.
autor: The Subject Tonight Is Love: 60 Wild and Sweet Poems of Hafiz
